init_eqs_str: a['runningaverage'] = 0; a['basstime'] = 0; a['stickybit'] = 0; a['q1'] = 0; a['samplesize'] = 0; a['volavg'] = 0; a['state'] = 0; a['vol'] = 0; a['q2'] = 0; a['react'] = 0; a['basssum'] = 0; a['state']=0;
frame_eqs_str: a['basstime']=(a['basstime']+(a['bass']*0.06)); a['q1']=a['basstime']; a['basstime']=((Math.abs(below(a['basstime'], 1000))>0.00001)?(1000):(a['basstime'])); a['vol']=pow(((a['bass']+a['mid'])+a['treb']), 2); a['basssum']=a['vol']; a['stickybit']=mod(a['time'],2); a['volavg']=(a['volavg']+(a['vol']*equal(a['stickybit'], 1))); a['samplesize']=100; a['runningaverage']=div((a['volavg']*equal(a['stickybit'], 1)),a['samplesize']); a['react']=(div(a['vol'],1.5)-a['runningaverage']); a['react']=((a['react']*Math.abs(a['react']))*0.1); a['state']=(a['state']+a['react']); ((Math.abs(above(a['state'], 100))>0.00001)?((a['state']*0.99)):(a['state'])); a['state']=(a['state']*0.005); a['q2']=a['state'];
